reviews.review_description: Fizz is pretty chill if you just wanna lay back and zone out. The visuals are beautiful. I want to be able to mess with them a little more, but it's also nice to just luxuriate in them. Looking forward to more interactivity.

reviews.review_title: Surpising Easter eggs and great MR
reviews.review_description:
I didn't have much expectation for the price and early release, but Fizz is pretty amazing. On the Black Hole Sun one, you can shoot comets and they follow the sun-thing. If you move the sun thing, the comets still follow. It's sick! 

I took it outside and moved it around the night sky with the comets blazing and twirling after it. I can't wait to see an update - especially if I can play my own mp3s from the MQ3 music directory locally. Add a ton of stuff (physics for bouncing things off the room setup model with lights and shadows would be a huge hit) and raise the price when you do! It's that good, going in the right direction for sure.
